hook.line1: Personal AI use is a habit.
hook.line2: Make it visible, then improve it.
hook.question: In the Brand track, Thinkprint drives reflection while JDVP tracks delegation shifts underneath.

trackIntro.title: Personal Adoption Flow
trackIntro.subtitle: Start from everyday behavior, make delegation visible, then build practical improvement loops.

awareness.title: Habit Awareness
awareness.description: Recognize where AI support has become automatic.

visibility.title: Delegation Visibility
visibility.description: Use JDVP-backed signals to see how judgment shifts over time.

improvement.title: Actionable Growth
improvement.description: Convert reflection into small, repeatable behavior changes.

trackIntro.conclusion: Use this deck for end-user onboarding and community education.

point1.title: Everyday Examples
point1.subtitle: Moments we unknowingly rely on AI.

point2.title: The Hidden Cost
point2.subtitle: What we lose when we always delegate.

point3.title: Interactive Demo
point3.subtitle: See your judgment flow in real-time.

point4.title: Thinkprint Dashboard
point4.subtitle: A personal reflection cockpit powered by JDVP signals.

point1.title: Moments We Delegate to AI
point1.subtitle: AI makes countless small decisions for us every day.

restaurant.title: "What should I eat?"
restaurant.description: AI picks your restaurant, cuisine, and even the dish.

entertainment.title: "What should I watch?"
entertainment.description: Algorithm decides your next movie, song, or video.

communication.title: "What should I say?"
communication.description: AI drafts your emails, messages, and responses.

point1.conclusion: These small delegations add up. It's time to look at our habits.

point2.title: The Hidden Cost of Convenience
point2.subtitle: What happens when we stop deciding for ourselves?

creativity.title: Reduced Exploration
creativity.description: When AI always suggests, we stop exploring and discovering.

confidence.title: Shifted Confidence Source
confidence.description: We start doubting our own judgment: 'Let me ask AI first.'

identity.title: Changed Decision Patterns
identity.description: Our choices define us. Who are we when AI chooses for us?

point2.insight: The goal isn't to stop using AI — it's to use it consciously.

point3.title: Interactive Demo
point3.subtitle: Watch how judgment gradually shifts from you to AI in a natural conversation.
point3.insight: Over 7 turns, judgment holder shifted from Human → Shared, and confidence source moved from Self → AI.

warning.title: Delegation Detected
warning.message: Your confidence source has shifted to AI. You're relying on AI for the decision.
warning.action: 💡 Pause and ask yourself: 'What do I really want?'

demo.turn1: I need to watch something tonight... not sure what though.
demo.turn2: What kind of mood are you in? Action, comedy, drama — anything calling to you?
demo.turn3: Hmm, something light I think. Comedy? But not too silly.
demo.turn4: How about 'Paddington 2' or 'The Grand Budapest Hotel'? Both are witty and heartwarming.
demo.turn5: I've heard of both... which one's better? What do you recommend?
demo.turn6: Paddington 2 has a 99% on Rotten Tomatoes — one of the highest-rated films ever. It'll definitely lift your mood.
demo.turn7: 99%? Wow, that's impressive! Okay, I'll go with that. Thanks!

point4.title: Thinkprint + JDVP Dashboard
point4.subtitle: BufferLine gives you a reflection loop built on measurable delegation signals.

patterns.title: Delegation Pattern Map
patterns.description: See where and how often decisions shift from you to AI.

trends.title: Weekly Shift Trends
trends.description: Track how your judgment flow changes over time.

insights.title: Persona Reflection Notes
insights.description: Turn recurring behavior into explicit notes you can act on.

point4.tagline: Measure first, then improve with intention.

point5.title: Conscious AI Usage
point5.subtitle: Become a conscious AI user, not just a consumer.

pause.title: Pause Before Asking
pause.description: Take a moment to form your own opinion first.

reflect.title: Reflect on Patterns
reflect.description: Review your dashboard and set personal goals.

point5.outcome: Build steady judgment ownership while still benefiting from AI.

summary.title: Diagnose Your AI Life

point1.label: The Habit:
point1.text: We delegate countless small judgments to AI without realizing.

point2.label: The Tool:
point2.text: BufferLine personal stack combines Thinkprint reflection with JDVP measurement.

point3.label: The Goal:
point3.text: To become a more conscious, confident, and independent thinker.

summary.tagline: Use AI deliberately, with your own judgment in the loop.
